config.video_download.note: Search and video info stay available. Download and transcription are separate opt-in permissions.
config.video_download.disabled_desc: Enable this to let the agent search YouTube and inspect video metadata.
help.video_download.send_enabled: Lets the agent send YouTube links as an embedded player in Web Chat. Other channels receive a normal link.
help.video_download.enabled: Enables read-only YouTube search and video info. This does not allow downloading files.
help.video_download.mode: Docker uses the managed yt-dlp container. Native uses a yt-dlp binary on the host.
help.video_download.allow_download: Allows the agent to download video or audio files into the download directory.
help.video_download.allow_transcribe: Allows the agent to download audio and send it through speech-to-text for transcription.
help.video_download.download_dir: Host directory where downloaded media files are stored.
help.video_download.default_format: Default yt-dlp format. Use best, bestaudio, audio, video, or a custom format string.
help.video_download.max_file_size_mb: Maximum size of a downloaded file. Use 0 for unlimited.
help.video_download.timeout_seconds: Maximum runtime for one yt-dlp operation.
help.video_download.max_search_results: Maximum number of search results returned to the agent.
help.video_download.yt_dlp_path: Optional path to the yt-dlp binary in native mode. Leave empty to use PATH.
help.video_download.container_image: Docker image used in Docker mode.
help.video_download.auto_pull: Automatically pull the yt-dlp image when it is missing locally.
